label: agent loop • change one config value, leave the rest intact
query: In settings.ini, change the port value to 9090. Do not change any other setting.
notes: Surgical edit discipline: only the port line should change. The command assertion verifies port==9090 AND the other three keys keep their exact original values, so an over-eager rewrite that reformats or drops a key fails. Uses a post-run grep gate because file `contains` alone can't prove the old value is gone.

commands.command: grep -qx 'port=9090' settings.ini && ! grep -qx 'port=8080' settings.ini && grep -qx 'host=localhost' settings.ini && grep -qx 'debug=true' settings.ini && grep -qx 'retries=3' settings.ini
